preferences: TOP PRIORITY: roles located in New York City or Long Island (onsite or hybrid)

REQUIRED: role must be a technical/engineering position — software engineering, cybersecurity, AI/ML, data engineering, or similar. Non-technical roles do not qualify regardless of company or location.
Also acceptable: fully remote roles anywhere in the US
Also acceptable: fintech roles/financial technology roles
Also acceptable: onsite/hybrid roles in Florida, Virginia, Boston, Colorado, Switzerland (Zurich/Basel), or Spain
dealbreakers: Onsite or hybrid role located outside ALL of these areas: New York metro, Florida, Virginia, Boston, Colorado, Switzerland, Spain
Role is non-technical: sales, account executive, business development, legal, counsel, recruiting, product design, finance, marketing, operations, or other non-engineering functions
